global_description: A medium-sized bird with a robust body and a thick neck. Predominantly black with a distinctive white patch on the back of the neck. Glossy feathers cover the body, giving it a sleek appearance. The beak is large and slightly curved, with a strong, sturdy structure.

part_details.neck: White patch contrasting with the rest of the black body, located on the back.
part_details.feathers: Glossy, black, sleek, covering the entire body.
part_details.body: Robust, medium-sized, covered in glossy black feathers.

spatial_relations: The white patch is located on the back of the neck.
The beak extends from the front of the head.
